title: Loki’s Chains and the Island’s Fear
description: On pages 6–8, this part follows Unknown person #4, King Harald, Unknown person #5, Usopp, Unknown person #6 as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm regenerating!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Stop this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the hell are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Harald?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It can't be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I really am immortal!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All of you, run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UWAAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How am I supposed to die now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone help me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'll cut to the chase.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Harald and I...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're both bound by the most shallow pact of the Holy Land...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to serve the individual they call the *great one.*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is just the shallow-sea covenant contract mind you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even then, when we're in range, we can't defy their orders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's a curious power.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah. It meant we could only talk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...more plainly when we were away from the Holy Land.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew it! You're from the red-hair pirates, aren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald would probably be happy to join the knights of God...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...If it helped Elbaf's membership bid, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he agrees, he'd have to enter into a deeper covenant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is that a problem?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The Covenant of a full Knight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...blesses them with inhuman strength and immortality.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're also granted the ability to travel vast distances by means of an abyss Pentagon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In exchange, the great one's voice can reach them anywhere...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So so disobedience becomes totally impossible. Even if you're far away.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald would be fully under their thumb if he enters into that deeper covenant.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those guys have a boundless appetite for greed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't see them just honoring their word.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: I really don't think Harald should join-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What the-?!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
